lines.speaker: Wizard
lines.text: I've heard there is a powerful magic presence in these lands, I'm gathering notes to take back with me to the Wizards' Tower.

lines.speaker: Wizard
lines.text: When we heard of a magical presence in the Western lands, the Wizards' Tower had no choice but to send out a research party.

lines.speaker: Wizard
lines.text: Some of these texts describe a 'Dark Altar', one can only imagine what power it possesses.

lines.speaker: Wizard
lines.text: The beings here seem to have transcended beyond the corporeal realm, truly fascinating!
